name: Grammar Email Block
description: Email -> { String:(s) -> "email@example.com"\n -> s ?! emailChar*1.. + '@' + emailChar*1.. + '.' + alpha*2.. } — README §Grammars block. The production is Product(Enforce(Identifier(s), <chain>)). The chain is Add-left-associative since '+' is TERM; each '*1..' is Operator(Multiply, X, Range(1,nil)) and '*2..' is Range(2,nil). The capture binding form String:(s) at CONSTRAINT level produces Constraint(Identifier(String),Identifier(,s)), then Pointing to the literal.
source:
Email -> {
  String:(s) -> "email@example.com"
  -> s ?!
    emailChar*1..
    + '@'
    + emailChar*1..
    + '.'
    + alpha*2..
}
